steps.title: Recognize the complex series
steps.content: The sentence lists three responsibilities: overseeing collections, managing the Copyright Office, and appointing the poet laureate. Because the list already uses a semicolon before the final item, the first and second items should also be separated with a semicolon.

steps.title: Keep the separators consistent
steps.content: Choice A gives no punctuation between the first two items. Choice B uses a comma where the later list structure calls for a semicolon. Choice D uses a period and leaves a fragment beginning with Managing. A semicolon correctly separates the first responsibility from the second. The answer is C.
